The Klras are mentioned in a number of epigraphic records.
Their country comprised the territory near Baijnalh in the Kangra
valley. A Ghamba copperplate inscription mentions Kjras between
Durgaras (Dongras) and Trigartas.
AbhisUra is identified by Dr. Stein with the tract of the lower
region and hills between the Jhelum and Chenab including the
state of Rajapura (Rajauri) in Kashmir.
Darada is Dardistan north of Kashmir on the upper Indus.
Sir Aurel Stein identifies its capital Daratpuri with modern Gurez.
Tnc seats of the Daradas extend from Chitral and Yasin across the
Indus region of Gilgit, Chilas and Bunji to the Kishangahga
